subject.address: S County Rd 1110, just north of Hwy. 307, Midland County, TX
subject.legalDescription: 34.295 AC tract out Section 48, Block 38, T-1-S, T&P RR County Survey, Abstract No. 728

neighborhood.description: Primarily industrial with open pasture land south of Interstate 20.

analysis.location: Located along S County Rd 1110, just north of Hwy 307.
analysis.sizeAndConfig: 34.295 acres with adequate frontage and rectangular configuration.
analysis.frontageAndAccessibility: Frontage along S County Rd 1110 provides excellent accessibility.
analysis.easements: Pipeline easement along the western boundary.
analysis.zoning: No zoning restrictions outside city limits.
analysis.propertyDevelopment: Vacant land suitable for industrial development.

ownership.salesHistory: The current owners, listed below, acquired the subject property on September 15, 1988, as recorded in Document 1988-17008. Prior to this, the property was part of a larger tract recorded in 1987 under Document 1987-9649. In 2023, 6.82 acres were sold from the total, as recorded in Document 2023-4167. No other transactions have occurred over the past five years.
ownership.salesHistorySingle: Acquired by Serape Holdings LLC in 2021 for $1,000,000.

dateOfSale.description: Most comparable sales occurred in 2021 and 2022.
dateOfSale.adjustments: Adjustments were made for market conditions.

analysis.size: Larger tracts tend to command a lower per-acre price.
